creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Yeap. It was caused by a degraded zpool. :(. Now everything is fine with my poudriere. :D
Poudriere logs:
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/tkrat/2.1.5_5/
